/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/main/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/main/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/main/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/main/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/bishop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/king.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/knight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/pawn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/piece.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/queen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuantumChess.dir/src/pieces/rook.cpp.o -o QuantumChess  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
